`[CAPABILITYKIND_OPERATIONAL_LITERAL](#CAPABILITYKIND_OPERATIONAL_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the Capability associated with this CapabilityKind is the ability, aptitude or fitness that OperationalAgent can have performing an Operational Activity, Mission task, or conducting an Enduring Task.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[CAPABILITYKIND_OTHER_LITERAL](#CAPABILITYKIND_OTHER_LITERAL)`

`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[CAPABILITYKIND_PERSONNEL_LITERAL](#CAPABILITYKIND_PERSONNEL_LITERAL)`

`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`

`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[CAPABILITYKIND_SECURITY_LITERAL](#CAPABILITYKIND_SECURITY_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the Capability associated with this CapabilityKind is the ability, aptitude or fitness that an OperationalMitigation or ResourceMitigation can have performing a Security Process.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[CAPABILITYKIND_SERVICE_LITERAL](#CAPABILITYKIND_SERVICE_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the Capability associated with this CapabilityKind is the ability, aptitude or fitness that a Service can have performing a Service Function.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[CAPABILITYKIND_STRATEGIC_LITERAL](#CAPABILITYKIND_STRATEGIC_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the Capability associated with this CapabilityKind is the ability, aptitude or fitness that an enterprise asset can have performing a Mission, ValueStream or conducting an Enduring Task to enable achievement of desired Effects and Outcomes.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`

`[DRIVERKIND_DATATYPE](#DRIVERKIND_DATATYPE)`
Enumeration of the possible kinds of Driver.

`[DRIVERKIND_OPERATIONAL_LITERAL](#DRIVERKIND_OPERATIONAL_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the Driver associated with this DriverKind is the kind of thing that forces the enterprise to work or act in a certain way from the operational perspective.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[DRIVERKIND_OTHER_LITERAL](#DRIVERKIND_OTHER_LITERAL)`

`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[DRIVERKIND_PERSONNEL_LITERAL](#DRIVERKIND_PERSONNEL_LITERAL)`

`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[DRIVERKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL](#DRIVERKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the Driver associated with this DriverKind is the kind of thing that forces the enterprise to work or act in a certain way from the projects perspective.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`

`[GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_COUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL](#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_COUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of political state, nation or its territory.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_DATATYPE](#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_DATATYPE)`
Enumeration of the possible kinds of GeoPoliticalExtentType.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_FACILITYTYPE_LITERAL](#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_FACILITYTYPE_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of a real property entity consisting of underlying land and one or more of the following: a building, a structure (including linear structures), a utility system, or pavement.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_GEOFEATURETYPE_LITERAL](#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_GEOFEATURETYPE_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of object that encompasses meteorological, geographic, and control features mission significance.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_INSTALLATIONTYPE_LITERAL](#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_INSTALLATIONTYPE_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of base, camp, post, station, yard, center, or other activity, including leased facilities, without regard to the duration of operational control.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL](#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type not covered by the standard GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKinds.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFCOUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL](#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFCOUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of large, usually continuous segment of a political state, nation or its territory.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFWORLDTYPE_LITERAL](#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFWORLDTYPE_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of large, usually continuous segment of a surface or space; area.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_SITETYPE_LITERAL](#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_SITETYPE_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of Physical (geographic) location that is or was owned by, leased to, or otherwise possessed.

`[LOCATIONKIND_POINT_LITERAL](#LOCATIONKIND_POINT_LITERAL)`

`[LOCATIONKIND_POLYGONAREA_LITERAL](#LOCATIONKIND_POLYGONAREA_LITERAL)`

`[LOCATIONKIND_RECTANGULARAREA_LITERAL](#LOCATIONKIND_RECTANGULARAREA_LITERAL)`

`[LOCATIONKIND_SOLIDVOLUME_LITERAL](#LOCATIONKIND_SOLIDVOLUME_LITERAL)`

`[LOCATIONKIND_SURFACE_LITERAL](#LOCATIONKIND_SURFACE_LITERAL)`

`[LOCATIONTYPEKIND_LINETYPE_LITERAL](#LOCATIONTYPEKIND_LINETYPE_LITERAL)`

`[MISSIONKIND_DATATYPE](#MISSIONKIND_DATATYPE)`

`[MISSIONKIND_MAJOROPERATION_LITERAL](#MISSIONKIND_MAJOROPERATION_LITERAL)`

`[MISSIONKIND_NATIONALPOLICY_LITERAL](#MISSIONKIND_NATIONALPOLICY_LITERAL)`

`[MISSIONKIND_OTHER_LITERAL](#MISSIONKIND_OTHER_LITERAL)`

`[PROJECTKIND_DATATYPE](#PROJECTKIND_DATATYPE)`
Enumeration of the possible kinds of project applicable to an ActualProject.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[PROJECTKIND_PERSONNELDEVELOPMENT_LITERAL](#PROJECTKIND_PERSONNELDEVELOPMENT_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking that relates to the training and enablement of personnel to enable them help achieve the organizations objectives.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[PROJECTKIND_PORTFOLIO_LITERAL](#PROJECTKIND_PORTFOLIO_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking comprised of the Projects and Programmes that are the totality of an organization's investment (or segment thereof) in the changes required to achieve its strategic objectives.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[PROJECTKIND_PROGRAMME_LITERAL](#PROJECTKIND_PROGRAMME_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking that is a temporary, flexible organization created to co-ordinate, direct and oversee the implementation of a set of related Projects and Tasks in order to deliver outcomes and benefits related to the organization s strategic objectives.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[PROJECTKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL](#PROJECTKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking that is a time-limited endeavor to create a specific set of products or services.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`

`[VALUEITEMKIND_BENEFIT_LITERAL](#VALUEITEMKIND_BENEFIT_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is an advantage or profit gained from achieving the EnterpriseGoal.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[VALUEITEMKIND_COST_LITERAL](#VALUEITEMKIND_COST_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is an amounts that an enterprise incurs in order to make goods and/or provide services.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[VALUEITEMKIND_DATATYPE](#VALUEITEMKIND_DATATYPE)`
Enumeration of the possible kinds of ValueItem.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[VALUEITEMKIND_KPI_LITERAL](#VALUEITEMKIND_KPI_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is a measurable value that demonstrates how effectively an enterprise is achieving key EnterpriseGoals and Objectives.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[VALUEITEMKIND_LOSS_LITERAL](#VALUEITEMKIND_LOSS_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is an amount of money lost by an enterprise.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[VALUEITEMKIND_OTHER_LITERAL](#VALUEITEMKIND_OTHER_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is not one of the standard ValueItemKinds.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[VALUEITEMKIND_QUALITY_LITERAL](#VALUEITEMKIND_QUALITY_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is a measure of excellence.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[VALUEITEMKIND_REVENUE_LITERAL](#VALUEITEMKIND_REVENUE_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is an income that an enterprise receives regularly, or an amount representing such income
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`
`[VALUEITEMKIND_TIME_LITERAL](#VALUEITEMKIND_TIME_LITERAL)`
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is the measured or measurable period during which an activity, process, or condition exists or continues.
`static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html)`

[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.DRIVERKIND_ARCHITECTURE_PRINCIPLE_LITERAL)
ENVIRONMENTKIND_LIGHTCONDITIONS_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ENVIRONMENTKIND_LIGHTCONDITIONS_LITERAL
Indicates that the Environment associated with EnvironmentKind captures a kind of light condition (e.g. broad daylight, dusk, moonlit, etc.).
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ENVIRONMENTKIND_LIGHTCONDITIONS_LITERAL)
ENVIRONMENTKIND_SITUATIONTYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ENVIRONMENTKIND_SITUATIONTYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Environment associated with EnvironmentKind captures a kind of situation used to describe the types and levels of threat (e.g. Corrosive, Fire, Smoke, Peaceful etc.).
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ENVIRONMENTKIND_SITUATIONTYPE_LITERAL)
ENVIRONMENTKIND_TERRAINTYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ENVIRONMENTKIND_TERRAINTYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Environment associated with EnvironmentKind captures a kind of terrain used to describe the terrain state of an environment at a particular time (e.g. muddy, frozen ground, deep snow, etc.).
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ENVIRONMENTKIND_TERRAINTYPE_LITERAL)
ENVIRONMENTKIND_WEATHERCONDITIONS_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ENVIRONMENTKIND_WEATHERCONDITIONS_LITERAL
Indicates that the Environment associated with EnvironmentKind captures a kind of weather condition (e.g. Typhoon, Hurricane, Very Hot, Humid etc.).
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ENVIRONMENTKIND_WEATHERCONDITIONS_LITERAL)
ENVIRONMENTKIND_CBRNENVIRONMENT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ENVIRONMENTKIND_CBRNENVIRONMENT_LITERAL
Indicates that the Environment associated with EnvironmentKind is of a Chemical, Biological, Radiological or Nuclear (CBRN) kind.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ENVIRONMENTKIND_CBRNENVIRONMENT_LITERAL)
GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type not covered by the standard GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKinds.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL)
GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_SITETYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_SITETYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of Physical (geographic) location that is or was owned by, leased to, or otherwise possessed. Each site is assigned to a single installation. A site may exist in one of three forms: (1) Land only, where there are no facilities present and where the land consists of either a single land parcel or two or more contiguous land parcels. (2) Facility or facilities only, where the underlying land is neither owned nor controlled by the government. A stand-alone facility can be a site. If a facility is not a stand-alone facility, it must be assigned to a site. (3). Land and all the facilities thereon, where the land consists of either a single land parcel or two or more contiguous land parcels.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_SITETYPE_LITERAL)
GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_FACILITYTYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_FACILITYTYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of a real property entity consisting of underlying land and one or more of the following: a building, a structure (including linear structures), a utility system, or pavement.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_FACILITYTYPE_LITERAL)
GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_INSTALLATIONTYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_INSTALLATIONTYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of base, camp, post, station, yard, center, or other activity, including leased facilities, without regard to the duration of operational control. An installation may include one or more sites.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_INSTALLATIONTYPE_LITERAL)
GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFCOUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFCOUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of large, usually continuous segment of a political state, nation or its territory.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFCOUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL)
GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFWORLDTYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFWORLDTYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of large, usually continuous segment of a surface or space; area.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFWORLDTYPE_LITERAL)
GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_GEOFEATURETYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_GEOFEATURETYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of object that encompasses meteorological, geographic, and control features mission significance.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_GEOFEATURETYPE_LITERAL)
GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_COUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_COUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of political state, nation or its territory.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_COUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL)
INFORMATIONKIND_POSITIONREFERENCEFRAME_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) INFORMATIONKIND_POSITIONREFERENCEFRAME_LITERAL
Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes an arbitrary set of axes with reference to which the position or motion of something is described or physical laws are formulated.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONKIND_POSITIONREFERENCEFRAME_LITERAL)
INFORMATIONKIND_PEDIGREEINFORMATION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) INFORMATIONKIND_PEDIGREEINFORMATION_LITERAL
Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes information pedigree.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONKIND_PEDIGREEINFORMATION_LITERAL)
INFORMATIONKIND_DOMAININFORMATION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) INFORMATIONKIND_DOMAININFORMATION_LITERAL
Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes information within the scope or domain of the architecture.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONKIND_DOMAININFORMATION_LITERAL)
INFORMATIONKIND_DATA_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) INFORMATIONKIND_DATA_LITERAL
Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes the
 representation of information in a formalized manner suitable for communication, interpretation, or processing by humans or by automatic means. Examples could be whole models, packages, entities, attributes, classes, domain values, enumeration values, records, tables, rows, columns, and fields.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONKIND_DATA_LITERAL)
INFORMATIONKIND_INFORMATION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) INFORMATIONKIND_INFORMATION_LITERAL
Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes the state of a something of interest that is materialized -- in any medium or form -- and communicated or received.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONKIND_INFORMATION_LITERAL)
INFORMATIONMODELKIND_CONCEPTUAL_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) INFORMATIONMODELKIND_CONCEPTUAL_LITERAL
Indicates that the InformationModel associated with the InformationModelKind is a conceptual InformationModel that defines the required high-level data concepts and their relationships.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONMODELKIND_CONCEPTUAL_LITERAL)
INFORMATIONMODELKIND_LOGICAL_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) INFORMATIONMODELKIND_LOGICAL_LITERAL
Indicates that the InformationModel associated with the InformationModelKind is a logical data model that allows analysis of an architecture s data definition aspect, without consideration of implementation specific or product specific issues. It details the conceptual data model.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONMODELKIND_LOGICAL_LITERAL)
INFORMATIONMODELKIND_PHYSICAL_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) INFORMATIONMODELKIND_PHYSICAL_LITERAL
Indicates that the InformationModel associated with the InformationModelKind is a physical data model that is an implementable specification of a data structure. A physical data model realizes a logical data model, taking into account implementation restrictions and performance issues while still enforcing the constraints, relationships and typing of the logical data model.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONMODELKIND_PHYSICAL_LITERAL)
LOCATIONKIND_OTHER_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONKIND_OTHER_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualLocation associated with the LocationKind is a LocationKind that is not on the enumerated list.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONKIND_OTHER_LITERAL)
LOCATIONKIND_LINE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONKIND_LINE_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualLocation associated with the LocationKind is a geometric figure formed by a point moving along a fixed direction and the reverse direction.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONKIND_LINE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONKIND_SURFACE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONKIND_SURFACE_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualLocation associated with the LocationKind is a portion of space having length and breadth but no thickness or regards to time.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONKIND_SURFACE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONKIND_CIRCULARAREA_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONKIND_CIRCULARAREA_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualLocation associated with the LocationKind is a space enclosed by a circle.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONKIND_CIRCULARAREA_LITERAL)
LOCATIONKIND_POLYGONAREA_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONKIND_POLYGONAREA_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualLocation associated with the LocationKind is a space enclosed by a polygon.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONKIND_POLYGONAREA_LITERAL)
LOCATIONKIND_RECTANGULARAREA_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONKIND_RECTANGULARAREA_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualLocation associated with the LocationKind is a space enclosed by a rectangle.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONKIND_RECTANGULARAREA_LITERAL)
LOCATIONKIND_ELIPTICALAREA_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONKIND_ELIPTICALAREA_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualLocation associated with the LocationKind is a space enclosed by an ellipse.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONKIND_ELIPTICALAREA_LITERAL)
LOCATIONKIND_PLANARSURFACE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONKIND_PLANARSURFACE_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualLocation associated with the LocationKind is a two-dimensional portion of space.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONKIND_PLANARSURFACE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONKIND_GEOSTATIONARYPOINT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONKIND_GEOSTATIONARYPOINT_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualLocation associated with the LocationKind is a unidimensional Individual.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONKIND_GEOSTATIONARYPOINT_LITERAL)
LOCATIONKIND_POINT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONKIND_POINT_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualLocation associated with the LocationKind is a unidimensional Individual.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONKIND_POINT_LITERAL)
LOCATIONKIND_SOLIDVOLUME_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONKIND_SOLIDVOLUME_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualLocation associated with the LocationKind is the amount of space occupied by a three-dimensional object of definite shape; not liquid or gaseous.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONKIND_SOLIDVOLUME_LITERAL)
LOCATIONTYPEKIND_SOLIDVOLUMETYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONTYPEKIND_SOLIDVOLUMETYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Location associated with the LocationTypeKind describes a type of amount of space occupied by a three-dimensional object of definite shape; not liquid or gaseous.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONTYPEKIND_SOLIDVOLUMETYPE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONTYPEKIND_LINETYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONTYPEKIND_LINETYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Location associated with the LocationTypeKind describes a type of geometric figure formed by a point moving along a fixed direction and the reverse direction.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONTYPEKIND_LINETYPE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Location associated with the LocationTypeKind describes a type of is a LocationKindType that is not on the enumerated list.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONTYPEKIND_PLANARSURFACETYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONTYPEKIND_PLANARSURFACETYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Location associated with the LocationTypeKind describes a type of is a two-dimensional portion of space.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONTYPEKIND_PLANARSURFACETYPE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONTYPEKIND_SURFACETYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONTYPEKIND_SURFACETYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Location associated with the LocationTypeKind describes a type of portion of space having length and breadth but no thickness or regards to time.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONTYPEKIND_SURFACETYPE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONTYPEKIND_CIRCULARAREATYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONTYPEKIND_CIRCULARAREATYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Location associated with the LocationTypeKind describes a type of space enclosed by a circle.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONTYPEKIND_CIRCULARAREATYPE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONTYPEKIND_POLYGONAREATYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONTYPEKIND_POLYGONAREATYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Location associated with the LocationTypeKind describes a type of space enclosed by a polygon.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONTYPEKIND_POLYGONAREATYPE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONTYPEKIND_RECTANGULARAREATYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONTYPEKIND_RECTANGULARAREATYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Location associated with the LocationTypeKind describes a type of space enclosed by a rectangle.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONTYPEKIND_RECTANGULARAREATYPE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONTYPEKIND_ELIPTICALAREATYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONTYPEKIND_ELIPTICALAREATYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Location associated with the LocationTypeKind describes a type of space enclosed by an ellipse.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONTYPEKIND_ELIPTICALAREATYPE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONTYPEKIND_GEOSTATIONARYPOINTTYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONTYPEKIND_GEOSTATIONARYPOINTTYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Location associated with the LocationTypeKind describes a type of unidimensional Individual.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONTYPEKIND_GEOSTATIONARYPOINTTYPE_LITERAL)
LOCATIONTYPEKIND_POINTTYPE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) LOCATIONTYPEKIND_POINTTYPE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Location associated with the LocationTypeKind describes a type of unidimensional Individual.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.LOCATIONTYPEKIND_POINTTYPE_LITERAL)
MISSIONKIND_NATIONALPOLICY_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) MISSIONKIND_NATIONALPOLICY_LITERAL
A broad course of action or statements of guidance adopted by the government at the national level in pursuit of national objectives. (JP 1)
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.MISSIONKIND_NATIONALPOLICY_LITERAL)
MISSIONKIND_OTHER_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) MISSIONKIND_OTHER_LITERAL
A different kind of mission
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.MISSIONKIND_OTHER_LITERAL)
MISSIONKIND_BATTLE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) MISSIONKIND_BATTLE_LITERAL
A hostile encounter between opposing military forces
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.MISSIONKIND_BATTLE_LITERAL)
MISSIONKIND_CAMPAIGN_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) MISSIONKIND_CAMPAIGN_LITERAL
A series of related major operations aimed at achieving strategic and operational objectives within a given time and space. (JP 5-0)
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.MISSIONKIND_CAMPAIGN_LITERAL)
MISSIONKIND_MAJOROPERATION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) MISSIONKIND_MAJOROPERATION_LITERAL
A series of tactical actions (battles, engagements, strikes) conducted by combat forces, coordinated in time and place, to achieve strategic or operational objectives in an operational area. (JP 3-0)
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.MISSIONKIND_MAJOROPERATION_LITERAL)
MISSIONKIND_ENGAGEMENT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) MISSIONKIND_ENGAGEMENT_LITERAL
A tactical conflict, usually between opposing lower echelons maneuver forces. See also battle; campaign. (JP 3-0)
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.MISSIONKIND_ENGAGEMENT_LITERAL)
MISSIONKIND_THEATERSTRATEGY_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) MISSIONKIND_THEATERSTRATEGY_LITERAL
An overarching construct outlining a combatant commander s vision for integrating and synchronizing military activities and operations with the other instruments of national power in order to achieve national strategic objectives. See also national military strategy; national security strategy; strategy. (JP 3-0)
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.MISSIONKIND_THEATERSTRATEGY_LITERAL)
MISSIONKIND_SMALLUNITANDCREWACTION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) MISSIONKIND_SMALLUNITANDCREWACTION_LITERAL
Small unit and Crew Action is the combat deployment of platoons and smaller units in a particular strategic and logistic environment
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.MISSIONKIND_SMALLUNITANDCREWACTION_LITERAL)
OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_MATERIELEXCHANGE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_MATERIELEXCHANGE_LITERAL
Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow of materiel (artifacts) between Functions.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_MATERIELEXCHANGE_LITERAL)
OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_CONFIGURATIONEXCHANGE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_CONFIGURATIONEXCHANGE_LITERAL
Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where CapabilityConfigurations flow from one OperationalPerformer to another.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_CONFIGURATIONEXCHANGE_LITERAL)
OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_GEOPOLITICALEXTENTEXCHANGE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_GEOPOLITICALEXTENTEXCHANGE_LITERAL
Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where GeoPoliticalExtentTypes (i.e. Borders) flow from one place to another.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_GEOPOLITICALEXTENTEXCHANGE_LITERAL)
OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_ENERGYEXCHANGE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_ENERGYEXCHANGE_LITERAL
Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where energy is flowed from one OperationalPerformer to another.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_ENERGYEXCHANGE_LITERAL)
OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_ORGANIZATIONALEXCHANGE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_ORGANIZATIONALEXCHANGE_LITERAL
Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where human resources (PostTypes, RoleTypes) flow between OperationalPerformers.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_ORGANIZATIONALEXCHANGE_LITERAL)
OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_INFORMATIONEXCHANGE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_INFORMATIONEXCHANGE_LITERAL
Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where information is flowed from one OperationalPerformer to another.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.OPERATIONALEXCHANGEKIND_INFORMATIONEXCHANGE_LITERAL)
PROJECTKIND_PORTFOLIO_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) PROJECTKIND_PORTFOLIO_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking comprised of the Projects and Programmes that are the totality of an organization's investment (or segment thereof) in the changes required to achieve its strategic objectives.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.PROJECTKIND_PORTFOLIO_LITERAL)
PROJECTKIND_PROGRAMME_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) PROJECTKIND_PROGRAMME_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking that is a temporary, flexible organization created to co-ordinate, direct and oversee the implementation of a set of related Projects and Tasks in order to deliver outcomes and benefits related to the organization s strategic objectives. A programme is likely to have a lifespan of several years. During a programme lifecycle, projects are initiated, executed, and closed. Programmes provide an umbrella under which these projects can be co-ordinated. The programme integrates the projects so that it can deliver an outcome greater than the sum of its parts.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.PROJECTKIND_PROGRAMME_LITERAL)
PROJECTKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) PROJECTKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking that is a time-limited endeavor to create a specific set of products or services.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.PROJECTKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL)
PROJECTKIND_PERSONNELDEVELOPMENT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) PROJECTKIND_PERSONNELDEVELOPMENT_LITERAL
Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking that relates to the training and enablement of personnel to enable them help achieve the organizations objectives.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.PROJECTKIND_PERSONNELDEVELOPMENT_LITERAL)
RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_RESOURCEMOVEMENT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_RESOURCEMOVEMENT_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceInteraction associated with the ResourceInteractionKind is a an implementation of logical flow of Resources between Resources.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_RESOURCEMOVEMENT_LITERAL)
RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_RESOURCECOMMUNICATION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_RESOURCECOMMUNICATION_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceInteraction associated with the ResourceInteractionKind is a an implementation of logical flow of data between Resources.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_RESOURCECOMMUNICATION_LITERAL)
RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_RESOURCEENERGYFLOW_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_RESOURCEENERGYFLOW_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceInteraction associated with the ResourceInteractionKind is a an implementation of logical flow of natural resources between Resources.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_RESOURCEENERGYFLOW_LITERAL)
RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_GEOPOLITICALEXTENTEXCHANGE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_GEOPOLITICALEXTENTEXCHANGE_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceInteraction associated with the ResourceInteractionKind is a an implementation of logical flow where GeoPoliticalExtents (i.e. Borders) flow from one place to another.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RESOURCEEXCHANGEKIND_GEOPOLITICALEXTENTEXCHANGE_LITERAL)
RESPONSIBLEROLEKIND_MANAGER_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RESPONSIBLEROLEKIND_MANAGER_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceInteraction associated with the ResourceInteractionKind is a an implementation of logical flow.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RESPONSIBLEROLEKIND_MANAGER_LITERAL)
RESPONSIBLEROLEKIND_RESPONSIBLEOWNER_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RESPONSIBLEROLEKIND_RESPONSIBLEOWNER_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceInteraction associated with the ResourceInteractionKind is a an implementation of logical flow.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RESPONSIBLEROLEKIND_RESPONSIBLEOWNER_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_SUB_ORGANIZATION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_SUB_ORGANIZATION_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of Organization that is typically the parent of another - e.g. a squadron may be part of a batallion, that is used in the context of a ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_SUB_ORGANIZATION_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_SUB_SYSTEM_PART_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_SUB_SYSTEM_PART_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of subsystem (represented as a ResourcePerformers) is is part of another ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_SUB_SYSTEM_PART_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_POST_ROLE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_POST_ROLE_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of Post that is used in the context of a ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_POST_ROLE_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_RESPONSIBILITY_ROLE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_RESPONSIBILITY_ROLE_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of Responsibility associated with a role that is used in the context of a ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_RESPONSIBILITY_ROLE_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_COMPONENT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_COMPONENT_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of Software that is used in the context of a ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_COMPONENT_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_PART_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_PART_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of a ResourcePerformer that is used as a part of another ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_PART_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_PLATFORM_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_PLATFORM_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of a ResourcePerformer that represents a platform (e.g. vessel, aircraft, etc.) that is used in the context of a SystemsResource.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_PLATFORM_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_SYSTEM_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_SYSTEM_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of assembly of ResourcePerformers that is used in the context of another ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_SYSTEM_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_USED_CONFIGURATION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_USED_CONFIGURATION_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of existing CapabilityConfiguration that is used in the context of a ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_USED_CONFIGURATION_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_USED_PHYSICAL_ARCHITECTURE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_USED_PHYSICAL_ARCHITECTURE_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of existing PhysicalArchitecture that is used in the context of a ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_USED_PHYSICAL_ARCHITECTURE_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_HUMAN_RESOURCE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_HUMAN_RESOURCE_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of human resource that is used in the context of a ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_HUMAN_RESOURCE_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_EQUIPMENT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_EQUIPMENT_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of man made resource that is used to accomplish a task or function in the context of a ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_EQUIPMENT_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_NATURAL_RESOURCE_COMPONENT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_NATURAL_RESOURCE_COMPONENT_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of natural resource that is used as a component in the context of a ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_NATURAL_RESOURCE_COMPONENT_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_ARTIFACT_COMPONENT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_ARTIFACT_COMPONENT_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of non human resource that is used as a component in the context of a ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_ARTIFACT_COMPONENT_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_HOSTED_SOFTWARE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_HOSTED_SOFTWARE_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of software that is used in the context of a ResourcePerformer.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_HOSTED_SOFTWARE_LITERAL)
ROLEKIND_OTHER_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) ROLEKIND_OTHER_LITERAL
Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is another kind of RoleKind that is not on the enumerated list.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.ROLEKIND_OTHER_LITERAL)
RULEKIND_ACTIONASSERTION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RULEKIND_ACTIONASSERTION_LITERAL
Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that concerns some dynamic aspect.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RULEKIND_ACTIONASSERTION_LITERAL)
RULEKIND_DERIVATION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RULEKIND_DERIVATION_LITERAL
Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details a Rule derived from another Rule.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RULEKIND_DERIVATION_LITERAL)
RULEKIND_CONTRACT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RULEKIND_CONTRACT_LITERAL
Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details a consent among parties regarding the terms and conditions of activities that said parties participate in.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RULEKIND_CONTRACT_LITERAL)
RULEKIND_SECURITYPOLICY_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RULEKIND_SECURITYPOLICY_LITERAL
Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details a constraint that specifies policy for information handling, physical security, encryption, etc.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RULEKIND_SECURITYPOLICY_LITERAL)
RULEKIND_CONSTRAINT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RULEKIND_CONSTRAINT_LITERAL
Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details a limitation, e.g. business rule, restraint, operational limitation.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RULEKIND_CONSTRAINT_LITERAL)
RULEKIND_CAVEAT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RULEKIND_CAVEAT_LITERAL
Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details alternate conditions under which the rule is not valid.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RULEKIND_CAVEAT_LITERAL)
RULEKIND_GUIDANCE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RULEKIND_GUIDANCE_LITERAL
Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details an authoritative statement intended to lead or steer the execution of actions.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RULEKIND_GUIDANCE_LITERAL)
RULEKIND_STRUCTURALASSERTION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RULEKIND_STRUCTURALASSERTION_LITERAL
Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details that something of importance either exists as a concept of interest or exists in relationship to another thing of interest.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RULEKIND_STRUCTURALASSERTION_LITERAL)
RULEKIND_ASSUMPTION_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) RULEKIND_ASSUMPTION_LITERAL
Indicates that the element is accepted as true or as certain to happen, without proof.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.RULEKIND_ASSUMPTION_LITERAL)
SERVICEEXCHANGEKIND_MATERIELEXCHANGE_LITERAL

[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.SERVICEEXCHANGEKIND_CONFIGURATIONEXCHANGE_LITERAL)

Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where energy is flowed from one OperationalPerformer to another.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.SERVICEEXCHANGEKIND_ENERGYEXCHANGE_LITERAL)
SERVICEEXCHANGEKIND_ORGANIZATIONALEXCHANGE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) SERVICEEXCHANGEKIND_ORGANIZATIONALEXCHANGE_LITERAL
Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where human resources (PostTypes, RoleTypes) flow between OperationalPerformers.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.SERVICEEXCHANGEKIND_ORGANIZATIONALEXCHANGE_LITERAL)
SERVICEEXCHANGEKIND_INFORMATIONEXCHANGE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) SERVICEEXCHANGEKIND_INFORMATIONEXCHANGE_LITERAL
Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where information is flowed from one OperationalPerformer to another.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.SERVICEEXCHANGEKIND_INFORMATIONEXCHANGE_LITERAL)
VALUEITEMKIND_KPI_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) VALUEITEMKIND_KPI_LITERAL
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is a measurable value that demonstrates how effectively an enterprise is achieving key EnterpriseGoals and Objectives.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.VALUEITEMKIND_KPI_LITERAL)
VALUEITEMKIND_QUALITY_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) VALUEITEMKIND_QUALITY_LITERAL
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is a measure of excellence.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.VALUEITEMKIND_QUALITY_LITERAL)
VALUEITEMKIND_BENEFIT_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) VALUEITEMKIND_BENEFIT_LITERAL
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is an advantage or profit gained from achieving the EnterpriseGoal.
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.VALUEITEMKIND_BENEFIT_LITERAL)
VALUEITEMKIND_LOSS_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) VALUEITEMKIND_LOSS_LITERAL
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is an amount of money lost by an enterprise.

[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.VALUEITEMKIND_LOSS_LITERAL)
VALUEITEMKIND_COST_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) VALUEITEMKIND_COST_LITERAL

[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.VALUEITEMKIND_COST_LITERAL)
VALUEITEMKIND_REVENUE_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) VALUEITEMKIND_REVENUE_LITERAL
Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is an income that an enterprise receives regularly, or an amount representing such income
See Also:
[Constant Field Values](../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.VALUEITEMKIND_REVENUE_LITERAL)
VALUEITEMKIND_OTHER_LITERAL
public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) VALUEITEMKIND_OTHER_LITERAL

public static final [String](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html) VALUEITEMKIND_TIME_LITERAL

Deprecated.
use ArchitecturalDescriptionStereotype.PURPOSE
Explains the need for the Architecture, what it will demonstrate, the types of analyses that will be applied to it, who is expected to perform the analyses, what decisions are expected to be made on the basis of each form of analysis, who is expected to make those decisions, and what actions are expected to result.

use ArchitecturalDescriptionStereotype.RECOMMENDATIONS
States the recommendations that have been developed based on the architecture effort. Examples include recommended system implementations, and opportunities for technology insertion.

<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ActualProjectMilestone associated with the ActualMilestoneKind is a configuration deployment milestone.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="block">Indicates that the ActualProjectMilestone associated with the ActualMilestoneKind is when the configuration goes into service.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPE_STEREOTYPE">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPE_STEREOTYPE</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use GeoPoliticalExtentTypeStereotype.STEREOTYPE_NAME</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_COUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_COUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of political state, nation or its territory.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_DATATYPE">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_DATATYPE</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Enumeration of the possible kinds of GeoPoliticalExtentType.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_FACILITYTYPE_LITERAL">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_FACILITYTYPE_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of a real property entity consisting of underlying land and one or more of the following: a building, a structure (including linear structures), a utility system, or pavement.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_GEOFEATURETYPE_LITERAL">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_GEOFEATURETYPE_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of object that encompasses meteorological, geographic, and control features mission significance.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_INSTALLATIONTYPE_LITERAL">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_INSTALLATIONTYPE_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of base, camp, post, station, yard, center, or other activity, including leased facilities, without regard to the duration of operational control.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type not covered by the standard GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKinds.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFCOUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFCOUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of large, usually continuous segment of a political state, nation or its territory.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFWORLDTYPE_LITERAL">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFWORLDTYPE_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of large, usually continuous segment of a surface or space; area.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_SITETYPE_LITERAL">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_SITETYPE_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of Physical (geographic) location that is or was owned by, leased to, or otherwise possessed.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#GOVERNEDBY_STEREOTYPE">GOVERNEDBY_STEREOTYPE</a></code></div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#INFORMATION_STEREOTYPE">INFORMATION_STEREOTYPE</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use InformationStereotype.STEREOTYPE_NAME</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#INFORMATIONKIND_DATA_LITERAL">INFORMATIONKIND_DATA_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes the
 representation of information in a formalized manner suitable for communication, interpretation, or processing by humans or by automatic means.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#INFORMATIONKIND_DATATYPE">INFORMATIONKIND_DATATYPE</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Enumeration of the possible kinds of Information.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#INFORMATIONKIND_DOMAININFORMATION_LITERAL">INFORMATIONKIND_DOMAININFORMATION_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes information within the scope or domain of the architecture.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#INFORMATIONKIND_INFORMATION_LITERAL">INFORMATIONKIND_INFORMATION_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes the state of a something of interest that is materialized -- in any medium or form -- and communicated or received.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#INFORMATIONKIND_PEDIGREEINFORMATION_LITERAL">INFORMATIONKIND_PEDIGREEINFORMATION_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes information pedigree.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#INFORMATIONKIND_POSITIONREFERENCEFRAME_LITERAL">INFORMATIONKIND_POSITIONREFERENCEFRAME_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes an arbitrary set of axes with reference to which the position or motion of something is described or physical laws are formulated.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#INFORMATIONMODEL_KIND_PROPERTY">INFORMATIONMODEL_KIND_PROPERTY</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use InformationModelStereotype.KIND</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#INFORMATIONMODEL_STEREOTYPE">INFORMATIONMODEL_STEREOTYPE</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use InformationModelStereotype.STEREOTYPE_NAME</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#INFORMATIONMODELKIND_CONCEPTUAL_LITERAL">INFORMATIONMODELKIND_CONCEPTUAL_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the InformationModel associated with the InformationModelKind is a conceptual InformationModel that defines the required high-level data concepts and their relationships.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Enumeration of the possible kinds of InformationModel.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the InformationModel associated with the InformationModelKind is a logical data model that allows analysis of an architecture   s data definition aspect, without consideration of implementation specific or product specific issues.</div>
</div>

</div>
