<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#MISSIONKIND_BATTLE_LITERAL">MISSIONKIND_BATTLE_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">A hostile encounter between opposing military forces</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#MISSIONKIND_CAMPAIGN_LITERAL">MISSIONKIND_CAMPAIGN_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">A series of related major operations aimed at achieving strategic and operational objectives within a given time and space.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#MISSIONKIND_DATATYPE">MISSIONKIND_DATATYPE</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">An enumerated list of kinds of missions.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#MISSIONKIND_ENGAGEMENT_LITERAL">MISSIONKIND_ENGAGEMENT_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">A tactical conflict, usually between opposing lower echelons maneuver forces.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#MISSIONKIND_MAJOROPERATION_LITERAL">MISSIONKIND_MAJOROPERATION_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">A series of tactical actions (battles, engagements, strikes) conducted by combat forces, coordinated in time and place, to achieve strategic or operational objectives in an operational area.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#MISSIONKIND_NATIONALPOLICY_LITERAL">MISSIONKIND_NATIONALPOLICY_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">A broad course of action or statements of guidance adopted by the government at the national level in pursuit of national objectives.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#MISSIONKIND_OTHER_LITERAL">MISSIONKIND_OTHER_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">A different kind of mission</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#MISSIONKIND_SMALLUNITANDCREWACTION_LITERAL">MISSIONKIND_SMALLUNITANDCREWACTION_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Small unit  and Crew Action  is the combat  deployment  of  platoons  and smaller units in a particular  strategic  and  logistic  environment</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#MISSIONKIND_THEATERSTRATEGY_LITERAL">MISSIONKIND_THEATERSTRATEGY_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">An overarching construct outlining a combatant commander   s vision for integrating and synchronizing military activities and operations with the other instruments of national power in order to achieve national strategic objectives.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#PROJECTKIND_DATATYPE">PROJECTKIND_DATATYPE</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Enumeration of the possible kinds of project applicable to an ActualProject.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#PROJECTKIND_PERSONNELDEVELOPMENT_LITERAL">PROJECTKIND_PERSONNELDEVELOPMENT_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking that relates to the training and enablement of personnel to enable them help achieve the organizations objectives.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#PROJECTKIND_PORTFOLIO_LITERAL">PROJECTKIND_PORTFOLIO_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an  undertaking comprised of the Projects and Programmes that are the totality of an organization's investment (or segment thereof) in the changes required to achieve its strategic objectives.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#PROJECTKIND_PROGRAMME_LITERAL">PROJECTKIND_PROGRAMME_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking that is a temporary, flexible organization created to co-ordinate, direct and oversee the implementation of a set of related Projects and Tasks in order to deliver outcomes and benefits related to the organization   s strategic objectives.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#PROJECTKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL">PROJECTKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking that is a time-limited endeavor to create a specific set of products or services.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

</div>

<div class="block">Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of natural resource that is used as a component in the context of a ResourcePerformer.</div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">

<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of a ResourcePerformer that represents  a platform (e.g.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of Post that is used in the context of a ResourcePerformer.</div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of Responsibility associated with a role that is used in the context of a ResourcePerformer.</div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of  Organization that is typically the parent of another - e.g.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of  subsystem (represented as a ResourcePerformers) is is part of another ResourcePerformer.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ResourceRole associated with the ResourceRoleKind is a kind of assembly of ResourcePerformers that is used in the context of another ResourcePerformer.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the element is accepted as true or as certain to happen, without proof.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details alternate conditions under which the rule is not valid.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details a limitation, e.g.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#RULEKIND_CONTRACT_LITERAL">RULEKIND_CONTRACT_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details a consent among parties regarding the terms and conditions of activities that said parties participate in.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Enumeration of the possible kinds of Rules applicable to constraints.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#RULEKIND_DERIVATION_LITERAL">RULEKIND_DERIVATION_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details a Rule derived from another Rule.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details an authoritative statement intended to lead or steer the execution of actions.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details a constraint that specifies policy for information handling, physical security, encryption, etc.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#RULEKIND_STRUCTURALASSERTION_LITERAL">RULEKIND_STRUCTURALASSERTION_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the Rule associated with the RuleKind is a statement that details that something of importance either exists as a concept of interest or exists in relationship to another thing of interest.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where CapabilityConfigurations flow from one OperationalPerformer to another.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Enumeration of the possible kinds of ServiceExchange.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where energy is flowed from one OperationalPerformer to another.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where information is flowed from one OperationalPerformer to another.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow of materiel (artifacts) between Functions.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where human resources (PostTypes, RoleTypes) flow between OperationalPerformers.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#VALUEITEMKIND_BENEFIT_LITERAL">VALUEITEMKIND_BENEFIT_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is an advantage or profit gained from achieving the EnterpriseGoal.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#VALUEITEMKIND_COST_LITERAL">VALUEITEMKIND_COST_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is an amounts that an enterprise incurs in order to make goods and/or provide services.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#VALUEITEMKIND_DATATYPE">VALUEITEMKIND_DATATYPE</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Enumeration of the possible kinds of ValueItem.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#VALUEITEMKIND_KPI_LITERAL">VALUEITEMKIND_KPI_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is a measurable value that demonstrates how effectively an enterprise is achieving key EnterpriseGoals and Objectives.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#VALUEITEMKIND_LOSS_LITERAL">VALUEITEMKIND_LOSS_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is an amount of money lost by an enterprise.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#VALUEITEMKIND_OTHER_LITERAL">VALUEITEMKIND_OTHER_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is not one of the standard ValueItemKinds.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#VALUEITEMKIND_QUALITY_LITERAL">VALUEITEMKIND_QUALITY_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is a measure of excellence.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second odd-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#VALUEITEMKIND_REVENUE_LITERAL">VALUEITEMKIND_REVENUE_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is an income that an enterprise receives regularly, or an amount representing such income</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>
<div class="col-second even-row-color"><code><a class="member-name-link" href="#VALUEITEMKIND_TIME_LITERAL">VALUEITEMKIND_TIME_LITERAL</a></code></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color">
<div class="block">Indicates that the ValueItem associated with this ValueItemKind is the measured or measurable period during which an activity, process, or condition exists or continues.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color"><code>static final <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></code></div>

<section class="detail" id="GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL">
<h3>GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type not covered by the standard GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKinds.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_OTHERTYPE_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_SITETYPE_LITERAL">
<h3>GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_SITETYPE_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_SITETYPE_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of Physical (geographic) location that is or was owned by, leased to, or otherwise possessed. Each site is assigned to a single installation. A site may exist in one of three forms: (1) Land only, where there are no facilities present and where the land consists of either a single land parcel or two or more contiguous land parcels. (2) Facility or facilities only, where the underlying land is neither owned nor controlled by the government. A stand-alone facility can be a site. If a facility is not a stand-alone facility, it must be assigned to a site. (3). Land and all the facilities thereon, where the land consists of either a single land parcel or two or more contiguous land parcels.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_SITETYPE_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_FACILITYTYPE_LITERAL">
<h3>GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_FACILITYTYPE_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_FACILITYTYPE_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of a real property entity consisting of underlying land and one or more of the following: a building, a structure (including linear structures), a utility system, or pavement.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_FACILITYTYPE_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_INSTALLATIONTYPE_LITERAL">
<h3>GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_INSTALLATIONTYPE_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_INSTALLATIONTYPE_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of base, camp, post, station, yard, center, or other activity, including leased facilities, without regard to the duration of operational control. An installation may include one or more sites.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_INSTALLATIONTYPE_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFCOUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL">
<h3>GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFCOUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFCOUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the GeoPoliticalExtentType associated with the GeoPoliticalExtentTypeKind is a type of large, usually continuous segment of a political state, nation or its territory.</div>

<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_REGIONOFCOUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_GEOFEATURETYPE_LITERAL">

</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_COUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL">

<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">GEOPOLITICALEXTENTTYPEKIND_COUNTRYTYPE_LITERAL</span></div>

<section class="detail" id="INFORMATIONKIND_POSITIONREFERENCEFRAME_LITERAL">
<h3>INFORMATIONKIND_POSITIONREFERENCEFRAME_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">INFORMATIONKIND_POSITIONREFERENCEFRAME_LITERAL</span></div>

</section>
</li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="INFORMATIONKIND_DOMAININFORMATION_LITERAL">
<h3>INFORMATIONKIND_DOMAININFORMATION_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">INFORMATIONKIND_DOMAININFORMATION_LITERAL</span></div>

<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONKIND_DOMAININFORMATION_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="INFORMATIONKIND_DATA_LITERAL">
<h3>INFORMATIONKIND_DATA_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">INFORMATIONKIND_DATA_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes the
 representation of information in a formalized manner suitable for communication, interpretation, or processing by humans or by automatic means. Examples could be whole models, packages, entities, attributes, classes, domain values, enumeration values, records, tables, rows, columns, and fields.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONKIND_DATA_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="INFORMATIONKIND_INFORMATION_LITERAL">
<h3>INFORMATIONKIND_INFORMATION_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">INFORMATIONKIND_INFORMATION_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the Information associated with the InformationKind describes the state of a something of interest that is materialized -- in any medium or form -- and communicated or received.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONKIND_INFORMATION_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="INFORMATIONMODELKIND_CONCEPTUAL_LITERAL">
<h3>INFORMATIONMODELKIND_CONCEPTUAL_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">INFORMATIONMODELKIND_CONCEPTUAL_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the InformationModel associated with the InformationModelKind is a conceptual InformationModel that defines the required high-level data concepts and their relationships.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONMODELKIND_CONCEPTUAL_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="INFORMATIONMODELKIND_LOGICAL_LITERAL">
<h3>INFORMATIONMODELKIND_LOGICAL_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">INFORMATIONMODELKIND_LOGICAL_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the InformationModel associated with the InformationModelKind is a logical data model that allows analysis of an architecture   s data definition aspect, without consideration of implementation specific or product specific issues. It details the conceptual data model.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONMODELKIND_LOGICAL_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="INFORMATIONMODELKIND_PHYSICAL_LITERAL">
<h3>INFORMATIONMODELKIND_PHYSICAL_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">INFORMATIONMODELKIND_PHYSICAL_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the InformationModel associated with the InformationModelKind is a physical data model that is an implementable specification of a data structure. A physical data model realizes a logical data model, taking into account implementation restrictions and performance issues while still enforcing the constraints, relationships and typing of the logical data model.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.INFORMATIONMODELKIND_PHYSICAL_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MISSIONKIND_MAJOROPERATION_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">A series of tactical actions (battles, engagements, strikes) conducted by combat forces, coordinated in time and place, to achieve strategic or operational objectives in an operational area. (JP 3-0)</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.MISSIONKIND_MAJOROPERATION_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MISSIONKIND_ENGAGEMENT_LITERAL">
<h3>MISSIONKIND_ENGAGEMENT_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MISSIONKIND_ENGAGEMENT_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">A tactical conflict, usually between opposing lower echelons maneuver forces. See also battle; campaign. (JP 3-0)</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.MISSIONKIND_ENGAGEMENT_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MISSIONKIND_THEATERSTRATEGY_LITERAL">
<h3>MISSIONKIND_THEATERSTRATEGY_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MISSIONKIND_THEATERSTRATEGY_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">An overarching construct outlining a combatant commander   s vision for integrating and synchronizing military activities and operations with the other instruments of national power in order to achieve national strategic objectives. See also national military strategy; national security strategy; strategy. (JP 3-0)</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.MISSIONKIND_THEATERSTRATEGY_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MISSIONKIND_SMALLUNITANDCREWACTION_LITERAL">
<h3>MISSIONKIND_SMALLUNITANDCREWACTION_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MISSIONKIND_SMALLUNITANDCREWACTION_LITERAL</span></div>

<dd>

</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="PROJECTKIND_PORTFOLIO_LITERAL">
<h3>PROJECTKIND_PORTFOLIO_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">PROJECTKIND_PORTFOLIO_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an  undertaking comprised of the Projects and Programmes that are the totality of an organization's investment (or segment thereof) in the changes required to achieve its strategic objectives.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.PROJECTKIND_PORTFOLIO_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="PROJECTKIND_PROGRAMME_LITERAL">
<h3>PROJECTKIND_PROGRAMME_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">PROJECTKIND_PROGRAMME_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking that is a temporary, flexible organization created to co-ordinate, direct and oversee the implementation of a set of related Projects and Tasks in order to deliver outcomes and benefits related to the organization   s strategic objectives. A programme is likely to have a lifespan of several years. During a programme lifecycle, projects are initiated, executed, and closed. Programmes provide an umbrella under which these projects can be co-ordinated. The programme integrates the projects so that it can deliver an outcome greater than the sum of its parts.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.PROJECTKIND_PROGRAMME_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="PROJECTKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL">
<h3>PROJECTKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">PROJECTKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL</span></div>
<div class="block">Indicates that the ActualProject associated with the ProjectKind is an undertaking that is a time-limited endeavor to create a specific set of products or services.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="tag-list">
<li><a href="../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.uaf.UAF.PROJECTKIND_PROJECT_LITERAL">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="PROJECTKIND_PERSONNELDEVELOPMENT_LITERAL">

<div class="member-signature"><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">PROJECTKIND_PERSONNELDEVELOPMENT_LITERAL</span></div>

</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<div class="block">Indicates that the OperationalExchange associated with the OperationalExchangeKind is a logical flow where information is flowed from one OperationalPerformer to another.</div>

</section>
</li>

<div class="block">A collection of OperationalActivities that consume and/or produce the OperationalExchangeItem internally.</div>

</section>
</li>

<section class="detail" id="getArchitecturalDescription()">
<h3>getArchitecturalDescription</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).architecturalDescription().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">An Architecture Description is a work product used to express the Architecture of some System Of Interest.
 It provides executive-level summary information about the architecture description in a consistent form to allow quick reference and comparison between architecture descriptions -- It includes assumptions, constraints, and limitations that may affect high-level decisions relating to an architecture-based work program.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>

<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<div class="block">A kind of phenomenon that follows and is caused by some previous phenomenon that could lead to downstream effects or to one or more desired outcomes</div>

The attributes associated with this element details the relationship between the element and its related dublinCoreElement, metaDataScheme, category and name. <dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>

<section class="detail" id="getOpposes()">
<h3>getOpposes</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getOpposes</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).opposes().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A tuple that indicates an open clash between two opposing groups (or individuals). This means that elements in the model are fighting against each other or are providing strong resistance to progress towards some goals. Note to entry: By individual this does not indicate instances in the model.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

</div>
<div class="block">A type that represents a situation involving exposure to danger of AffectableElements (e.g. Assets, Processes, Capabilities, Opportunities, or Enterprise Goals) where the effects of such exposure can be characterized in terms of the likelihood of occurrence of a given threat and the potential adverse consequences of that threat's occurrence.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<div class="block">An end-to-end collection of activities that create a result for a customer, who may be the ultimate customer or an internal end-user of the value stream. <dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
